product_overview: A web-based Point-of-Sale (POS) application for cafés and restaurants that supports first-time setup, staff selection, table-based ordering, payment processing, menu management, and a customer self-service order page.
core_goals: Provide a guided first-time setup so venues can configure name and owner and proceed directly to staff login on the root path.
Allow staff to quickly identify themselves and use a table-based POS to take orders and process cash or online payments.
Enable authorized users to manage menu items from within the POS and persist changes to Firestore.
Offer a public /order route for customer self-service ordering without staff interaction.
Surface administrative views (bills, expenses, reports, table/staff management) in the main layout for admins.

features.name: First-Time Setup Wizard
features.description: Guided multi-step onboarding on initial launch (root path) to configure venue and owner; skipped automatically if setup data exists in Firestore.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Wait for skeleton loader to disappear -> See setup wizard with venue name input field (placeholder 'e.g. The Grand Hotel') -> Enter venue name in the input field -> Click Next button to proceed -> Enter owner full name in the Full Name input field -> Click Next button to proceed -> Click Next button to advance through menu setup -> Click Finish button to submit -> See the staff login grid after wizard completes

Navigate to / -> Wait for skeleton loader to disappear -> See setup wizard with venue name input field (placeholder 'e.g. The Grand Hotel') -> Leave venue name empty -> Click Next button to proceed -> See validation error for venue name -> Enter valid venue name -> Click Next to continue
Navigate to / -> Wait for skeleton loader to disappear -> See staff login grid (setup wizard skipped because setup data exists in Firestore)

features.name: Staff Login
features.description: Staff select their card from a grid on the root path to authenticate into the POS (no separate /login route).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See the 'Who is working?' heading -> See employee cards displayed as a grid -> Click on an employee card to log in -> See the POS table grid dashboard after selecting an employee
Navigate to / -> See the 'Who is working?' heading -> See no employee cards -> See prompt to add staff or contact administrator and cannot proceed to POS

features.name: POS Ordering & Payment
features.description: Staff selects a table, adds menu items to a cart, and processes cash or online payments. Tables and UI elements use data-testid attributes for integration and E2E flows.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click on a table card (data-testid starts with 'table-1') -> See the table cart and menu panel appear -> Click Add button on a menu item card -> See Add to Order confirmation dialog -> Click Add to Order in the dialog -> See cart total update in the cart panel (data-testid='cart-total') -> Click Process Payment button (data-testid='pay-button') -> See the payment dialog appear (data-testid='payment-dialog') -> Select Cash payment method -> Enter cash received amount in the cash input field (id='cash-received') with amount >= total -> Click Confirm Cash Payment button (data-testid='confirm-cash-payment') -> See payment success and dialog close -> See table status become Available

Navigate to / -> Click on a table card (data-testid starts with 'table-1') -> See the table cart and menu panel appear -> Click Add button on a menu item card -> See Add to Order confirmation dialog -> Click Add to Order in the dialog -> See cart total update in the cart panel (data-testid='cart-total') -> Click Process Payment button (data-testid='pay-button') -> See the payment dialog appear (data-testid='payment-dialog') -> Select Cash payment method -> Enter cash received amount in the cash input field (id='cash-received') with amount < total -> Click Confirm Cash Payment button (data-testid='confirm-cash-payment') -> See validation error indicating insufficient cash

Navigate to / -> Click on a table card (data-testid starts with 'table-1') -> See the table cart and menu panel appear -> Ensure cart total is 0 -> Observe Process Payment button (data-testid='pay-button') is disabled

features.name: Menu Management
features.description: Authorized staff can open a Manage Menu dialog to add or edit menu items; items persist to Firestore and appear in the POS menu.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Log in as authorized staff -> Click Manage Menu button or icon to open the dialog -> Fill out item name input -> Fill out item price input with a positive number -> Optionally fill out item description -> Click Save button to persist item to Firestore -> See new item appear in the menu list

Navigate to / -> Log in as authorized staff -> Click Manage Menu button or icon to open the dialog -> Fill out item name input -> Leave item price input empty or enter a negative value -> Click Save button -> See validation error when price is missing or invalid

features.name: Customer Self-Service Order
features.description: Public-facing ordering page at /order that allows customers to browse the menu, add items, and submit orders without staff interaction.
user_flows: Navigate to /order -> Browse menu items -> Click Add button on a menu item to add it to cart -> See cart update -> Click Submit order -> See order confirmation message
Navigate to /order -> Browse menu items -> Do not add items to cart -> Click Submit order -> See validation error preventing empty order submission

features.name: Admin Dashboard & Table Management
features.description: Administrative tabs in the main layout provide bill history, expenses, reports, table and staff management; table management controls add/rename/remove tables reflected on the POS grid.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Log in as admin -> Click Bill History tab in main layout -> See list of completed bills with totals -> Click Expenses tab -> Click Add Expense button -> Fill expense fields -> Click Save -> See expense appear in list
Navigate to / -> Log in as admin -> Open Table Management tab -> Click Add Table button -> Enter table name -> Click Save -> See new table card appear with data-testid 'table-{N}'
Navigate to / -> Log in as non-admin user -> Attempt to open Sales Report / Analytics tab -> See permission denied or tab disabled

routes.description: Main POS Dashboard - includes Setup Wizard on first launch, then Staff Login grid, then POS table view

features.name: First Time Setup Wizard
features.description: Guided onboarding wizard that appears on first launch to configure venue name and owner. Only shown if no setup data exists in Firestore.
user_interactions: Wait for skeleton loader to disappear
See setup wizard with venue name input field (placeholder 'e.g. The Grand Hotel')
Enter venue name in the input field
Click Next button to proceed
Enter owner full name in the Full Name input field
Click Next button to proceed
Click Finish or Complete button to submit
See the staff login grid after wizard completes

features.name: Staff Login
features.description: After setup wizard, a grid of employee cards is shown. Clicking a card authenticates as that staff member.
user_interactions: See the 'Who is working?' heading
See employee cards displayed as a grid
Click on an employee card to log in
See the POS table grid dashboard after selecting an employee

features.name: POS Ordering Flow
features.description: Staff selects a table, browses the menu, adds items to the cart, and processes cash or online payment.
user_interactions: Click on a table card (data-testid starts with 'table-')
See the table cart and menu panel appear
Click Add button on a menu item card to add it to cart
See cart total update in the cart panel (data-testid='cart-total')
Click Process Payment button (data-testid='pay-button') which is enabled only when cart has items
See the payment dialog appear (data-testid='payment-dialog')
Enter cash received amount in the cash input field (id='cash-received')
Click Confirm Cash Payment button (data-testid='confirm-cash-payment')
See payment success and dialog close

features.name: Menu Management
features.description: Authorized staff can create and edit menu items from within the POS via a Manage Menu dialog.
user_interactions: Click Manage Menu button or icon to open the dialog
Fill out item name input
Fill out item price input (must be a positive number)
Optionally fill out item description
Click Save button to persist item to Firestore
See new item appear in the menu list
See validation error when price is missing or invalid

features.name: Customer Self-Service Order
features.description: Customers can browse the menu and place orders from the /order route without staff interaction.
user_interactions: Navigate to /order
Browse menu items
Add items to cart
Submit order

known_limitations.issue: Setup wizard state depends on Firestore data - if data exists tests must skip wizard
known_limitations.impact: Tests must handle both wizard-present and wizard-skipped states

known_limitations.issue: Cart total only updates after a menu item is explicitly added via the Add button or dialog
known_limitations.impact: Tests must click the Add button inside the menu card, not just the card itself
